# BinSirin

> Authentic Islamic dream interpretation grounded in the classical texts of Ibn Sirin and Al-Nabulsi. Every interpretation cites its primary source.

BinSirin is a dream interpretation tool that retrieves matching passages from a curated corpus of classical Islamic scholarship (Ibn Sirin's *Muntakhab al-Kalam fi Tafsir al-Ahlam* and Al-Nabulsi's *Ta'tir al-Anam fi Tafsir al-Ahlam*) and presents them alongside the interpretation, with source citations. No modern or psychological methods are used.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Submit a dream and receive an interpretation grounded in classical Islamic sources, with citations.
- [Install](/install): Install BinSirin as a Progressive Web App on iOS or Android.
